relationship_to_restored_text: Interpretive contemplative layer aligned by verse. This does not replace the source-audited restored translation.

verses.mystical_translation: Beloved, test spirits rather than trusting every voice.
The Spirit of Divine confesses Jesus Messiah come in flesh.
The opposing-Messiah spirit refuses embodied confession.
Greater is the One in you than the one in the world-system.
The world-system hears its own speech.
Discern truth from wandering.
Love one another, because love is from Divine.
The one not loving has not known Divine, because Divine is love.
Divine love is manifest in the sent Son through whom we live.
Love begins with Divine loving us first.
So loved, we love one another.
The unseen Divine remains visible through mutual love.
Spirit lets us know mutual remaining.
The Father sent the Son as Savior of the world.
Confessing the Son opens mutual indwelling.
The Divine is love, and remaining in love is remaining in Divine.
Completed love gives boldness in judgment.
Complete love casts fear outside.
We love because he first loved us.
Love for unseen Divine is tested by love for seen sibling.
The command is indivisible: love Divine and love sibling.

contemplative_note: 1 John 4 is the heart of the heart: Divine is love, embodied confession matters, fear is cast out, and the unseen Divine is known through visible love.
